questions.question: Discuss the salient features of the E-Waste (Electrical and Electronic Equipment) Guidelines 2022 under the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986. How do these guidelines impact the environmental and health implications of e-waste management in India? (15 marks)
What are the key global initiatives launched in 2022 to address the growing problem of e-waste? Analyze the implications of these initiatives on the global e-waste management landscape. (10 marks)

Explain the salient features of the e-waste management standards and regulations introduced in India in 2022. How do these regulations impact the recycling and disposal of e-waste in the country? (5 marks)
